icp_name: Local Service Business Owner — Cleaning Companies (Primary)

goals: Get more jobs without relying on word-of-mouth
Show up on Google when people search for cleaning services
Stop losing leads to competitors who respond faster
Get more 5-star reviews to build trust
frustrations: Paying for ads that don't generate real calls
Website gets no traffic or looks outdated
Leads come in but nobody follows up fast enough
Competitors with worse service rank higher on Google
No idea which marketing efforts are actually working
Tried hiring a marketing person — got social media posts instead of leads
objections: I've been burned by marketing companies before
I don't have time to deal with another vendor
How long before I see results?
My business runs on referrals, I don't need marketing
I tried Google Ads and it was a waste of money
buying_triggers: Slow season coming — need to fill the pipeline
Just lost a big contract, need to replace revenue
Competitor is growing faster and they're not even better
Hired new crews but don't have enough jobs to keep them busy
Got a bad batch of reviews and it's hurting business

where_they_hang_out: Google search (they Google their own problems)
Facebook groups for cleaning business owners
YouTube (watch 'how to grow my cleaning business' videos)
ISSA trade shows and local business associations
what_they_value: Straight talk — no jargon, no BS
Results they can see: phone calls, booked jobs, revenue
Someone who understands their business, not just 'digital marketing'
Low time commitment from them — they're busy running crews
disqualifiers: Solo cleaner with no employees (can't afford it)
Already working with a marketing agency they're happy with
Not willing to ask customers for reviews
No website or unwilling to get one
